rewind_on_death.label: Time-Rewind on Death
rewind_on_death.description: When you die, time rewinds about two seconds and you continue. The first time you ever earn this in a fight, a cinematic plays; after that, only a brief flourish accompanies each rewind.

clash_trigger.label: Force the Clash
clash_trigger.description: Clashes automatically fire on clean parries and equal-strength collisions. Spend a resource to force a clash from a neutral moment, freezing both fighters and presenting a choice.

prediction_reflex.label: Read & Reflex
prediction_reflex.description: Ghost arrows show the next one or two optimal moves through the boss's attack patterns. When you would take a hit and a recent prediction would have moved you clear, your character auto-dodges.
